description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a rich orange skin and a prominent, slightly twisted brown stem. The surface is matte with subtle, natural ridges and a slightly uneven, organic shape. On one side, there is a carved section featuring a jagged, open mouth and a triangular eye, typical of a traditional jack-o'-lantern design. The carving exposes the pale yellowish interior flesh, contrasting with the deep orange exterior. The pumpkin's skin appears firm and hard, while the stem is woody and textured. There are no visible decorative accessories or additional embellishments.
description: A round orange pumpkin with a brown stem and a traditional jack-o'-lantern carving on one side, exposing its pale interior.
description_view_0: This view shows the pumpkin's carved face with a jagged mouth and triangular eye, as well as the brown stem.
description_view_1: The pumpkin is seen from the back, showing its uncarved, smooth orange surface and the stem angled to the left.
description_view_2: A side view highlighting the pumpkin's roundness and uncarved surface, with the stem visible at the top.
description_view_3: This view displays the opposite side of the pumpkin, fully uncarved and smooth, with the stem pointing upward.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with a jagged open mouth and a single triangular eye cutout, exposing the pale interior flesh. The carving is simple and classic, with no additional motifs or etchings.
